title: koanophyllon droserolepis
side_effects: Koanophyllon droserolepis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can cause nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can also lead to dermatitis and skin ulcers. Additionally, improper handling of the plant can cause respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath.
